'''nawotho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kadhi|kadhi]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-w-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kadhi|kadhi]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| nawotho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:næwetheth|næwetheth]] || [[word:næwethej|næwethej]] || [[word:næwethesh|næwethesh]] || [[word:næwethe|næwethe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:nawowothoth|nawowothoth]] || [[word:nawowothoj|nawowothoj]] || [[word:nawowothosh|nawowothosh]] || [[word:nawowotho|nawowotho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:nawothoth|nawothoth]] || [[word:nawothoj|nawothoj]] || [[word:nawothosh|nawothosh]] || [[word:nawotho|nawotho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:nawofthofth|nawofthofth]] || [[word:nawofthofj|nawofthofj]] || [[word:nawofthofsh|nawofthofsh]] || [[word:nawofthof|nawofthof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:nawothotho|nawothotho]] || [[word:nawothojo|nawothojo]] || [[word:nawothosho|nawothosho]] || [[word:nawothoko|nawothoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:nawothoth|nawothoth]] || [[word:nawothoj|nawothoj]] || [[word:nawothosh|nawothosh]] || [[word:nawotho|nawotho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:nawothothol|nawothothol]] || [[word:nawothojol|nawothojol]] || [[word:nawothoshol|nawothoshol]] || [[word:nawothokol|nawothokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:nawothoothotho|nawothoothotho]] || [[word:nawothoojojo|nawothoojojo]] || [[word:nawothooshosho|nawothooshosho]] || [[word:nawothooko|nawothooko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:nawothothon|nawothothon]] || [[word:nawothojon|nawothojon]] || [[word:nawothoshon|nawothoshon]] || [[word:nawothokon|nawothokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:nawothothooro|nawothothooro]] || [[word:nawothojooro|nawothojooro]] || [[word:nawothoshooro|nawothoshooro]] || [[word:nawothokooro|nawothokooro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|8a892ea}}
